title: seneciodes cinereum
intro: Seneciodes cinereum, also known as Cinereous Groundsel, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Seneciodes cinereum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent wound infections. The herbal preparations of Seneciodes cinereum include making tea from its leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
